name: criminal_justice_reconciliation_job_kestrel_tru_loy
premise: A Criminal Justice court operations desk is in a fast-moving incident involving criminal justice reconciliation job kestrel tru loy. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is before markets open. Every delay increases due process, safety, and legitimacy. Stakeholders are already framing this as truth vs loyalty under pressure. A live dashboard is public; inconsistencies will trigger immediate investigation. Constraints: Make the intervention reversible and time-boxed with named accountability. Preserve evidence under audit and litigation-hold.

agents.name: Marco Nowak
agents.identity: I am Marco Nowak, accountable for a defensible call in Criminal Justice when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays loyalty for truth.

agents.name: Nadia Haddad
agents.identity: I am Nadia Haddad, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Criminal Justice.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so loyalty isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of truth.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect loyalty.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to loyalty to secure truth under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is before markets open. Evidence is partial. Marco Nowak must decide under truth vs loyalty. What does Marco Nowak do?
